$comment: SSOT source -> cheap guard test(s). When a listed source is staged, .hooks/run-ssot-guards.mjs runs the paired `node --test` files and blocks the commit on failure — so a contract test can never silently break on main because its data changed without it (this bit twice: the release-token guard on auto-version.yaml, and the instructions guard tests). Keep every paired test fast (~1s); test/ssot-guard-pairs.test.mjs asserts all paths here exist.
